name: Upgrade Mode — Fix a poorly structured skill
description: Tests Claude Code Skillforge's ability to diagnose issues in an existing skill and upgrade it to latest best practices.
prompt:
Upgrade this skill:

---
name: seo_analyzer
license: MIT
description: A tool that analyzes SEO
---

# SEO Analyzer

## Goal
Analyze SEO for websites.

## Steps
1. The user provides a URL.
2. The tool checks the title tag.
3. The output should include recommendations.
expected_behaviors: Detects non-standard 'license' field in front matter
Flags name uses underscores instead of hyphens
Flags description doesn't start with 3rd-person verb
Flags missing trigger phrases in description
Flags steps don't start with imperative verbs
Produces diagnostic report with Pass/Warning/Fail per item
Pauses for user confirmation before upgrading
Outputs upgraded SKILL.md with all issues fixed
Preserves the original SEO analysis intent
